name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Marietta, GA pawn shop - Value Pawn & Jewelry at 493 Cobb Pkwy SE offers quick cash loans on jewelry, electronics, and valuables.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry at 493 Cobb Pkwy SE in Marietta, GA is a standalone pawn shop serving the local community with quick cash options. Located in Marietta on Cobb Parkway, this branch is open Monday through Friday 9 AM–7 PM and Saturdays 9 AM–6 PM (closed Sundays). The location accepts jewelry, electronics, and other valuables for loans or purchase.

At this Marietta location, you can get immediate cash loans against personal items including jewelry, watches, electronics, and collectibles. Call 678-290-9670 to ask about current loan rates, appraisals, or to discuss what items the shop accepts. The staff can guide you through the pawn process and explain terms before you commit.

If you need quick cash in Marietta, GA, bring a valid government-issued ID and the item you want to pawn—the team will evaluate it on the spot. Value Pawn & Jewelry provides a straightforward alternative to payday loans, with transparent pricing and no credit checks required.
pros: EZ+ Rewards program earns points on pawns, sales, and purchases with online account management
Instant Quote tool estimates electronics value online before visiting the store
In-store gold and metal testing ensures accurate pricing for sellers
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down payment required
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new inventory
Jewelry VIP Program includes guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, and freestone replacement
This Miami location carries firearms and auto loans — special categories not at all EZPAWN branches
cons: No APR, fee rates, or loan term details disclosed on the website — cost of borrowing is opaque
'Take Today' financing depends on third-party lenders and credit eligibility with no disclosed rates
Not all services are available in all areas — some programs have state-level restrictions
Product Protection Plans and Jewelry VIP Program are add-on costs on top of purchase price
Pawn loans are short-term and fee-based — typically more expensive than credit union or personal loan alternatives
best_for: People who own electronics, jewelry, or tools and need immediate cash without a credit check
Budget shoppers looking for discounted brand-name electronics, jewelry, and fashion
Gold and diamond jewelry sellers seeking an in-store expert appraisal and immediate payment
Shoppers who cannot access traditional credit and need layaway or flexible take-home financing
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for Miami residents who own pawnable assets and need same-day cash without a credit application, or bargain hunters seeking discounted pre-owned brand-name goods. The main caveat is that pawn loan fees are not disclosed online and can be costly relative to other credit products — consumers who qualify for a personal loan or credit union PAL should compare costs before pawning.
services: Gold and diamond jewelry buying (any karat, broken gold accepted)
Pre-owned retail merchandise sales (electronics, jewelry, tools, fashion, gaming, musical gear)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Take Today third-party flexible financing (up to 12 months, credit-dependent)
EZ+ Rewards program with online pawn and layaway account management
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, freestone replacement)
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Firearms sales (special category at this location)
Auto loans (special category at this location)
meta_description: Marietta, GA pawn shop - Value Pawn & Jewelry at 493 Cobb Pkwy SE. Quick cash loans on jewelry, electronics & valuables—no credit check.
